gstack.notes: GStack is intentionally managed-latest because team mode is designed to keep role behavior fresh.

gsd.notes: GSD is managed by the global harness update-check flow. install.sh installs `@opengsd/get-shit-done-redux` and runs `get-shit-done-redux --claude --global --standard` and `--codex --global --standard` to deploy runtime skills into the user's Claude Code and Codex config directories.

superpowers.notes: Superpowers is installed manually through each runtime's plugin marketplace (`/plugin install superpowers@claude-plugins-official` for Claude Code; `/plugins` search inside Codex). The harness does not automate this because the official paths require an interactive plugin host; install.sh prints instructions and `./harness doctor` verifies the result.
